issues.description: Missing Reveal mechanic. Effect should Reveal 1 card from top of deck before SearchDeck action. Current DSL only searches without revealing.
SearchDeck filter incomplete. Should specify 'Character' kind in addition to cost ≤2. Current filter only checks cost.
Missing deck placement action. After playing card, remaining revealed card must be placed at top or bottom of deck. Current DSL has no mechanism for this.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' frequency constraint on OnAttack trigger. DSL has no frequency modifier.
Missing condition: DrawCard should only occur if you have 6 or less cards in hand. Current DSL has no hand size condition.
